mapper.insert:
SELECT nextval('action_item_seq')
INSERT INTO action_item (id, entry_id, content, is_completed) VALUES (#{id}, #{entryId}, #{content}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN is_completed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed, SUM(CASE WHEN feedback = 'GOOD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS good FROM action_item WHERE entry_id IN (SELECT id FROM journal_entry WHERE user_id = #{userId})

SELECT ai.id, ai.entry_id, ai.content, ai.is_completed, ai.feedback, je.created_at AS entry_created_at, je.relationship_tag AS relationship_tag FROM action_item ai JOIN journal_entry je ON ai.entry_id = je.id WHERE je.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ai.id ASC
